contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Reach us on KakaoTalk Open Chat or Instagram DM — we share booking, status, and before/after delivery photos.
contact.note: ※ Please keep valuables (cash, passport, electronics) with you. A liability waiver signature is required at drop-off.
